conservative.name: Shemtek's Fortune
conservative.requirements:
4 Power
No other spells currently recharging. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You cast the spell, and suffer 1 stress
As above, but you do not suffer stress
As above, and add 1 recharge token to this spell

chaosStar.description: Effect: While this card is recharging, you may remove all recharge tokens fro this spell to re-roll a number of dice from one of your skill checks up to the number of recharge tokens removed. Dice showing a result cannot be re-rolled. When the last recharge token is removed, suffer 1 stress
While this card is recharging, any dice you roll with a result must be re-rolled until is no longer showing

sigmarsComet.description: Effect: While this card is recharging, you may remove all recharge tokens from this spell to immediately force an NPC within medium range to re-roll a number of dice from one of his skill checks up to the number of recharge tokens removed. Dice showing a result cannot be re-rolled. When the last recharge token is removed, suffer 1 fatigue
